tools.description: List all managed network devices (IP, hostname, vendor, group/site, status) from the SentinelNet inventory.
tools.name: list_devices

tools.description: Get the discovered network topology: nodes (devices with type, vendor, VTP info) and links (local/remote ports, Port-Channel/LAG membership with per-side aggregate ids).
tools.name: get_network_map

tools.description: List all EtherChannel/Port-Channel aggregates detected in the network with their member interfaces per device.
tools.name: get_port_channels

tools.description: Locate a MAC address in the network: returns the access switch/port where the host is attached (uplink/trunk sightings filtered out).
tools.name: locate_mac

tools.description: Search the historical MAC address table across all switches. All filters optional.
tools.name: search_mac

tools.description: Resolve MAC <-> IP bindings for network clients, collected from the ARP tables of the L3 gateways (L3 switches or firewalls, whichever routes the VLAN). Search by MAC (full or fragment) or IP prefix.
tools.name: mac_to_ip

tools.description: Unified client view: MAC + current IP (from the routing gateway's ARP) + access switch/port (from the MAC table). Answers 'who is 10.0.0.5 and which port is it attached to'.
tools.name: client_map

tools.description: Collect the ARP tables from managed L3 devices (switches and firewalls) and store MAC<->IP bindings in the historical DB. Requires operator role; optionally restrict to one device IP or a site/group.
tools.name: arp_scan

tools.description: Analyze the stored configuration backup of a device: VLANs, SVIs, routing, trunk/access ports, neighbors, security findings.
tools.name: analyze_config

tools.description: Get the status of the last triage run (reachability, backup, version detection) for every device.
tools.name: get_triage_status

tools.description: Run a single CLI command on a managed device via SSH and return the output. Destructive commands are blocked server-side; requires an account with operator role.
tools.name: send_cli_command

tools.description: List the configured sites (central + remote) with mode (central-poll/agent), subnets and last-seen time.
tools.name: list_sites

tools.description: Get live system status of a FortiGate firewall (version, HA, uptime, hostname) via REST API or SSH fallback.
tools.name: fortigate_status

tools.description: Get live interface state of a FortiGate: IPs, link status, speed, counters, VLANs, aggregates.
tools.name: fortigate_interfaces

tools.description: Get the live ARP table of a FortiGate (IP <-> MAC on each interface).
tools.name: fortigate_arp

tools.description: Get active DHCP leases from a FortiGate (client IP, MAC, hostname, expiry, interface).
tools.name: fortigate_dhcp_leases

tools.description: Get the FortiOS device-identification inventory: every client the FortiGate has detected with MAC, IP, hostname, OS, ingress interface, online/offline state.
tools.name: fortigate_device_inventory

tools.description: Get the configured firewall policies of a FortiGate (full policy table: src/dst interfaces and addresses, services, action, NAT, UTM profiles, logging).
tools.name: fortigate_policies

tools.description: Get the firewall address book of a FortiGate (name, type, subnet/FQDN, comment) — slim cmdb read, useful to resolve object names used in policies.
tools.name: fortigate_firewall_addresses

tools.description: Get the firewall policy table of a FortiGate with only the fields relevant to observability (policyid, name, src/dst interfaces and addresses, service, action, status, logtraffic). Slimmer than fortigate_policies.
tools.name: fortigate_firewall_policy_objects

tools.description: Get the custom firewall services of a FortiGate (name, TCP/UDP port ranges, comment).
tools.name: fortigate_firewall_services

tools.description: Ask the FortiGate which firewall policy WOULD match a given flow (source IP, destination IP/FQDN, protocol, port) without generating traffic. Key tool for 'why can't client X reach site Y'.
tools.name: fortigate_policy_lookup

tools.description: Get active sessions on a FortiGate, filterable by source IP, destination IP and destination port.
tools.name: fortigate_sessions

tools.description: Get the live IPv4 routing table of a FortiGate.
tools.name: fortigate_routes

tools.description: Query FortiGate forward traffic logs (what the firewall logged for a client/destination: allowed, denied, UTM verdicts). Filters optional.
tools.name: fortigate_traffic_logs

tools.description: List WiFi clients connected to FortiAPs managed by a FortiGate, with signal strength (RSSI/SNR), AP, SSID, data rates. Use for wireless disconnection troubleshooting.
tools.name: fortigate_wifi_clients

tools.description: List FortiAPs managed by a FortiGate: status, channel utilization, connected clients, firmware.
tools.name: fortigate_managed_aps

tools.description: Get the complete live configuration of a FortiGate (full backup text). Large output; requires operator role.
tools.name: fortigate_full_config

tools.description: One-shot diagnosis of a client (IP or MAC) through a FortiGate: device inventory, ARP, DHCP lease, active sessions, matching firewall policy toward an optional destination, recent traffic logs, WiFi state. Answers 'why can't this client reach X' / 'why does this client disconnect'.

dest.description: Optional destination IP/FQDN for policy lookup

tools.name: fortigate_diagnose_client

tools.description: Get status of a Cisco wireless LAN controller (AireOS or Catalyst 9800): version, uptime, AP/client counts.
tools.name: wlc_status

tools.description: List access points joined to a Cisco WLC: name, model, IP, clients, location, state.
tools.name: wlc_ap_summary

tools.description: List wireless clients on a Cisco WLC with AP, WLAN/SSID, state and protocol.
tools.name: wlc_client_summary

tools.description: Full detail for one wireless client by MAC: AP, SSID, RSSI/SNR, data rates, roaming/session history, policy state. Use for disconnection troubleshooting.
tools.name: wlc_client_detail

tools.description: List WLANs/SSIDs configured on a Cisco WLC with status and security policy.
tools.name: wlc_wlan_summary

tools.description: List rogue/interfering access points detected by a Cisco WLC (possible cause of client disconnections).
tools.name: wlc_rogue_aps

tools.description: One-shot wireless diagnosis of a client (MAC) on a Cisco WLC: client detail (RSSI/SNR/AP/SSID), AP summary, WLAN summary and nearby rogue APs. Answers 'why do clients on this AP disconnect'.
tools.name: wlc_diagnose_client

tools.description: Generate a hardened day-0 FortiOS configuration for a new FortiGate (zero-touch provisioning; does not touch any device). Same parameters as the FortiGate ZTP wizard.
tools.name: generate_fortigate_config

tools.description: Generate a hardened day-0 Cisco IOS/IOS-XE configuration for a new switch (does not touch any device). Accepts the same parameters as the 'Zero-Touch Switch' wizard.
tools.name: generate_switch_config

tools.description: Get the top bandwidth consumers (aggregated flow records) for a time window. Read-only, tenant-scoped, summarized (top-N only).
tools.name: get_top_talkers

tools.description: Get correlated security anomalies (blocked traffic matched with flow evidence and switch port). Read-only, tenant-scoped.
tools.name: get_anomalies
